message:
perf(channel): #[inline] oneshot send/try_recv and broadcast send/recv

Add #[inline] to hot-path functions in oneshot (Sender::send,
Permit::send, Receiver::try_recv, is_closed) and broadcast
(Sender::send, Receiver::recv, poll_recv_with_waiter) to enable
cross-crate inlining.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
